feed.title: AO3 - Damian Wayne/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Damian Wayne/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Distractions
entry.summary:
Author: h0ttiewithab0dy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,835Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Damian Wayne does not have any friends. They’re a waste of time and a distraction from his work as Robin. But when Alfred insists that having a friend could be potentially beneficial, he caves. And the girl he chooses to tolerate ends up breaking through all his walls and into his heart.

entry.title: You won't be alone darling
entry.summary:
Author: Blop_blip13

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,867Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 126

Summary: Reader moving to gotham to start a new life there away from her past. Only hoping that the vigilantes will keep her for most of the time safe.And that she won't find here soulmate here.... (I will change the tags later)Yandere batfam x readerSoulmate au

entry.title: It's Only Love, Nobody Dies
entry.summary:
Author: vivid_dreamer7

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,586Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 54

Summary: Meeting at the age of 6, you and Damian have been inseperable since… much to his feigned displeasure. Now, 12 years later, adulthood is hitting you and being a senior in high school is kicking your ass. On top of that, hook-up culture has gone mainstream leaving you with an extreme case of FOMO. 18 and still haven't had our first kiss? Not on your watch. And who better to ask to have your first kiss with than your best friend who is also inexperienced? It's only one kiss. … Right? ~Join our hormonal teens as they navigate a world neither of them truly understand: romance and healthy relationships. Will they be able to get out of this hellhole they both jumped headfirst in? Or will this decision ruin their friendship forever?~

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: You know that you had it once.
entry.summary:
Author: vanillameringuecookie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,446Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 199

Summary: Daughter of King Roman “Black Mask” Sionis, arranged in a marriage to unite with the Kingdom of Gotham has to marry one of King Bruce Wayne’s sons. She has to choose one but she doesn’t even know herself yet, but they know what they want.

entry.title: damian’s in his feelings (and he can’t get out of it)
entry.summary:
Author: melesdots

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,839Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 53

Summary: Damian Wayne had a heart of gold. His hands were gentle, his voice soft, his arms aching to wrap around somebody. Yet, he was convinced love was something he could never have. Perhaps it was a consequence of his childhood, or maybe he was right: everyone he loved was bound to leave him eventually. His siblings seemed to have an easier time with matters of the heart, and were determined to show him it was not the minefield he imagined after he grew the courage to ask for help. Of course, despite their efforts, the only one who could make him see he is deserving of it was you.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Gotham's Creature
entry.summary:
Author: HALPMEWILLYOU

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,847Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 62

Summary: Since when have you been like this? You don´t remember a time where you didn´t feel this hunger, this pain. And now what? How will you convince everyone that nothing is happening to you'? That you are still a person, a normal human being, not some kind of fucked up thing wearing an ill fitting human custome. There´s no time to be scared, you have to feed, lest you try to bite a chunk out of one of them. Fucking great.

entry.title: "Penny" [Damian Wayne x reader]
entry.summary:
Author: Emma_ghsjixv

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 93,449Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 1,489

Summary: "Listen. I'm the son of Batman. When he'll die, everything of his will be mine, and that includes BEING Batman. And if you're Pennyworth's apprentice, that means you'll be MY Pennyworth. So you better start ahead of time and help me.""A-Alright.""Good. Let's go Penny.""Penny???"

entry.summary:
Author: pugcasket

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,329Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 43

entry.title: Ecantu dignoscitur avis ( you’ll know the bird by its song )
entry.summary:
Author: Hellofromsomewhere

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,183Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 10

Summary: Damian knew something was wrong the moment his mother had left him in the dreary and ridiculed streets of Gotham . As he was made to stand infront of the man known as the bat -“ A warrior , who was worthy” , his mother told him , “A soldier , His father” . Damian had heard the songs of his praises , which rang through their sacred halls , yet himself knew the man only as a stranger.-At a crossroad what path will Damian choose
